dialogos.texto_en: Okay everybody listen, it's lunchtime now.
Hey Itsuki, aren't you the one who is looking forward to\nlunchtime the most?
It's not just me okay?\nEveryone was looking forward to this, right guys?
Of course we were!\nA barbecue on the beach is awesome!
The charcoal is smoldering, and we're all set.\nLet's throw the meat on the grill and eat as much as we can!
Yotsuba, don't gnash the tongs together like that.
WOOOW?!\nLook at the different kinds of meat and fish!
I thought it would be mainly seafood\nsince we're in Okinawa,\nbut they have plenty of different meat too.
Good for you, Itsuki-chan.
Y-yes, since they've prepared all of this for us,\nit's only polite to eat everything, right guys?
I wonder what to grill first.\nIt might not be a good idea to grill seafood\nafter the meat...
Then let's use a different grill.\nThere are a few of them prepared for us, right?
Is that so?\nI thought other people will be using them.
That might be true. That's why we need to figure out\nhow to use them effectively.
Yeah, it looks like the grills are heated up already.
Adjusting the amount of charcoal to create high and low heat \nzones might be a good idea. We also need a spot to\nkeep the food warm.
Ah, I see.\nWe should separate the food by cooking time.
That's right.\nIt might not work as well as a stove,\nbut it's better than nothing.
Alright, I'll be the fire keeper.
Please be careful not to burn yourself.
Okay, then I'll take care of the meat on this grill. \nNow let's start with...
Wait.\nI have some foil here,\nlet's use it for the meat.
Nino-san, I'll help you too!
Thanks. Could you take care of the seafood grill?
Okay!
Put the hard-to-cook vegetables on the low heat zone, then\ngrill the main chunks of meat on the high heat one%p-2;――
When the surface of the meat is done,\nwrap it tightly with foil and let it rest for a bit.
After resting for five minutes, all we have to do is\ncut the meat and it's ready to be served.
You're really good at this...
We'll leave everything that's ready to eat on this plate,\nso please help yourselves.
Alright, let's dig in!
It's delicious...
It's cooked perfectly!\nAs expected from Nino.
I'm a natural!\nFutaro, you can eat as much as you want.
Okay.
This is really delicious.\nAre you using garlic oil for these vegetables?
Yeah.\nWe got plenty of seasonings,\nand Nino-san thought a little change would be nice.
I think fresh ingredients are also important,\nbut the flavors have really been brought out.
Alright, the yakisoba is done.\nWho's ready to eat?
ME!
Me too.
Give me your plate, I'll serve you.
Wait, there's a fried egg in there too?!\nWhen did you prepare that?
Crush it and mix it with the noodles.\nIt should make for a perfect seasoning.
Nino, bless me with your cooking too!
Sure, I'll give you a big chunk of meat!
Man, really... The way the meat is prepared and\nhow you grilled the vegetables...\nThis is just...*chef's kiss*
This barbecue is on a whole different level. I've never tasted\nanything like it before.
Have I strengthened the bond between us?
Hey...\nWh-what are you talking about...?
Uesugi-san, here's your miso soup!\nIt's your chance to ask her \nto make it for you every day!
Y-Yotsuba?!
What is this? The '50s?!
But, if you're into Japanese cuisine for breakfast,\nthat's fine.\nI'll make you something delicious.
Ooohh, a reverse proposal...!
No, it's not like that! You're getting it wrong!
Ahaha!\nWell, he's right. Proposing with yakisoba in one hand\nis definitely out.
A-anyway, I have an idea!\nHow about Nino and Raiha take a break,\nand I'll take over as the cook?
I'm fine with preparing the food, you know?
Ah, well, um...\nYou two haven't even eaten yet\nsince you've been cooking the food for all of us, right?
For now, I'll be cooking for you guys,\nso why don't you grab something to eat too?
...Are you perhaps being considerate of us, Futaro?
Come on! The spatula and chopsticks, hand 'em over!
Teehee!\nWell then, I'll leave it to you.
(I've placed the vegetables and meat on the griddle.\n As long as I watch the heat like Nino does\n and cook it properly, it should work out...)
Big bro, are you okay?
Sorry, I burned it.\nWhy'd that happen...?
Barbecuing looks easy\nbut it's actually difficult, you know?
Unlike a stove, you can't adjust the fire,\nso you have to keep an eye on the grill\nand flip the meat to prepare it properly.
I-I see.\nNow that you mention it, it's not as easy as it looks.
Futaro.\nPass me the meat, please.
No, you can't eat this!
It's fine. You cooked it for us and I appreciate the effort.
Hey, seriously, stop it!\nNino...!
Nom!\nMmm, it's delicious!\nYou did a good job.
...Sorry about that.
Why are you apologizing?\nYou're overthinking, Futaro.
Since we're here,\nlet me teach you how to improve your cooking.\nNext time will be our yummiest meal ever!
Okay, got it.
*sigh*\nI'm so full.\nBoth the meat and seafood were fantastic.
Thanks to Nino and Raiha-chan,\nwe had a wonderful lunch.\nMuch appreciated.
You're welcome!
You should show your gratitude like that more often,\neven on regular occasions.
Okay.
U-umm, excuse me.
Yes? Can I help you?
Oh, no way!\nYou're Nakano Ichika-san, right?
W-we're fans of yours!\nCan we get a handshake?!
Thank you for always cheering me on.\nI'd love giving you a handshake.\nHere you go.
We love your work so much!
Thank you too.
This is a private event,\nso please don't get too excited, now.\nI'd like to relax with my family.
Y-yes! Of course!\nThank you so much!
Wow, you handled the situation so well, like a real celebrity.
Sometimes things like this happen,\nbut I'm getting better at handling them.
You really have the aura of a great actress, Ichika.
(I was too focused on the barbecue and didn't notice,\n but are we standing out?\n It feels like we're drawing attention...)
Hey, who are those people over there?\nAll the girls are so cute.
Are they all siblings or something?\nThey look so alike.
(Ah...\n Those guys over there are talking.)
(It's hard to believe that someone as beautiful as Ichika has\n four other siblings that look exacty like her.\n I would imagine they're all beautiful.)
What kind of gathering is that guy at,\nto be with such beautiful women? It doesn't make sense.
One guy and five girls? That's obviously unbalanced.
(...Is he talking about me?)
(Well, it's true that I stick out\n when I'm with them.)
Ah-that surprised me.\nI was really caught off guard.
You handled it very well.
I'm glad you said that.\nIt's just that it's hard\nto turn down requests on my days off.
Well, as long as it's not an unreasonable request,\nI intend to take care of my admirers.
I'm genuinely happy that they've become my fans.
But, I'm sorry that\neveryone got startled.
It's okay. You need to take care of your fans.
Plus, it makes me happy to see it.\nIt makes me realize that there are a lot of people\nout there cheering for you, Ichika.
Yeah, I feel the same way.
(All of the girls are so awesome.)
(And they're rich too...\n They're living in a completely different world\n than me.)
(Especially Nino is kindhearted\n and caring towards her sisters.)
(She's always asserting herself,\n she is passionate and dedicated...\n Even if she can be a bit extreme sometimes.)
(The more I think about her...\n she's, like...really cute.)
(After confessing to her, I'm actually DATING\n Nino as her boyfriend...)
Hey, Futaro?\nWhat's up? Why are you staring at me?
Ah...\nNah, it's nothing...
...What?
It's really nothing.
I see.\nWell, okay then.
I heard there's ice cream for dessert.\nIt's in the cooler box,\nso pick your favorite one, okay?
Oh, really.\nThen, I'll go grab it.
